violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025

The following areas in the basement area are in poor repair. -walls (holes and black residue observed) -ceiling (hole observed) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

The floors (throughout) and walls (kitchen area) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025
Menu is lacking allergen statement. PIC added to menu while on site. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Poster given and to PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
Handwashing sinks throughout establishment are lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
The hand-washing sink in the men's restroom and bathroom in basement was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in basement restroom . Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

(Pulled pork) was observed held at (72) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated to 165 Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

(Ham) was observed held at (69) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2025

(Various food product) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

(Beef and cream based sauce ) was observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing.PIC informed of proper thawing procedures. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Working containers of (dry ingredients and spices ) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
Inspector observed live cat, cat food, and litter box in establishment. PIc informed and removed cat during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings in basement ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (front door), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
Inspector observed ice being stored in the 3 bay sink. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the (kitchen ) area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
The following non-food contact surfaces observed with debris:1.all refrigeration units2.food carts3.food prep shelves4.food storage racks5.stove hoods New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
The ceiling in the (kitchen ) area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025
The ceilings (basement) and floors(bar and kitchen)area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and clutter(boiler room) were observed in the basement area . Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
